data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking, but the evidence provided does not confirm that these features are implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for net terms and due-date tracking, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that these functionalities are present in the current saga run. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of net terms (Net-15/30/45) and due-date tracking implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for net terms and due-date tracking
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that net terms and due-date tracking are correctly implemented and functioning.
